sections.paragraph:
Original: רבץ

Transliteration: râbats

Phonetic: raw-bats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to stretch oneself out, lie down, lie stretched out
    1. (Qal) to lie down, lie
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to lie down
      1. laying (stones)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2109

Part(s) of speech: Verb
